name: Hebei Yangyuan ZhiHui Beverage Co., Ltd.
summary: Hebei Yangyuan ZhiHui Beverage Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, processing, production, and sale of walnut milk beverages in China. The company's products include protein and compound drinks. It also sells its products online. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hengshui, China.
